006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack;
018
019import java.io.*;
020import java.lang.reflect.*;
021
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
025
026/**
027 * Reference implementation of the public {@link TokenReader} surface for the MessagePack format.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * Backed by the existing internal {@link MsgPackInputStream} plumbing.  MessagePack containers
031 * are length-prefixed; this cursor tracks the remaining-element-count per level on a stack and
032 * emits END_* when the count is exhausted.
033 *
034 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
035 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe.
036 *    <li>The cursor is a true O(1)-memory streaming cursor ({@link #isStreaming()} == <jk>true</jk>).
037 * </ul>
038 */
039@SuppressWarnings({
040   "resource" // The cursor's underlying ParserPipe is owned by the caller via try-with-resources on the cursor itself; Eclipse JDT flags the inner pipe as unclosed but that's by design.
041})
042public class MsgPackTokenReader implements TokenReader {
043
044   private final MsgPackInputStream is;
045   private final ParserPipe pipe;
046   private final MsgPackParserSession session;
047
048   private TokenType currentToken = TokenType.NOT_AVAILABLE;
049   private boolean ended;
050
051   // Container stack (parallel arrays).
052   private long[] stackRemaining = new long[16];
053   private boolean[] stackIsMap = new boolean[16];
054   private boolean[] stackAwaitingKey = new boolean[16];
055   private int depth;
056
057   // Scratch for current value.
058   private String currentString;
059   private String currentNumberLexeme;
060   private Number currentNumber;
061   private boolean currentBoolean;
062   private byte[] currentBinary;
063
064   // Binary-native opt-in state (175ad).  Defaults preserve the normalize-by-default contract:
065   // EXT payloads surface as VALUE_BINARY with no metadata.  When nativeMode is true, the EXT
066   // branch additionally captures the signed type byte into 'extType' and sets
067   // 'nativeKind' = MSGPACK_EXT.
068   private boolean nativeMode;
069   private BinaryNativeKind nativeKind = BinaryNativeKind.NONE;
070   private int extType;
071
072   /**
073    * Constructor with default settings.
074    *
075    * @param pipe The parser input pipe.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
076    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying stream.
077    */
078   public MsgPackTokenReader(ParserPipe pipe) throws IOException {
079      this(pipe, null);
080   }
081
082   /**
083    * Constructor used by {@link MsgPackParserSession#parseTokens(Object)} to plumb the calling
084    * session through.
085    *
086    * @param pipe The parser input pipe.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
087    * @param session The {@link MsgPackParserSession} for {@link #read(Class)} delegation,
088    *    or <jk>null</jk> to disable {@code read}.
089    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying stream.
090    */
091   public MsgPackTokenReader(ParserPipe pipe, MsgPackParserSession session) throws IOException {
092      this.pipe = pipe;
093      this.is = new MsgPackInputStream(pipe);
094      this.session = session;
095   }
096
097   /**
098    * Enables or disables binary-native opt-in mode.
099    *
100    * <p>
101    * When enabled, MsgPack {@code ext} tokens carry the signed type byte via
102    * {@link #getExtType()}.  When disabled (default), the payload still surfaces as
103    * {@link TokenType#VALUE_BINARY} but the type byte is dropped &mdash; identical to the
104    * pre-native-mode behavior.
105    *
106    * @param value <jk>true</jk> to enable native mode.
107    * @return This object.
108    */
109   public MsgPackTokenReader setNativeMode(boolean value) {
110      nativeMode = value;
111      return this;
112   }
113
114   // ==============================================================================================
115   // State-machine summary.  MsgPack containers are length-prefixed (no indefinite-length
116   // encoding), so next() reads the data-type tag via MsgPackInputStream.readDataType() and
117   // dispatches based on: (1) whether we're at end-of-input, (2) whether the current container's
118   // remaining element count has reached zero (emit END_*), and (3) within a map, whether we're
119   // at a key position or value position.
120   //
121   // Per-level container state lives on parallel stacks (stackRemaining + stackIsMap +
122   // stackAwaitingKey, indexed by depth).  Each emit decrements stackRemaining[top]; map-level
123   // emits also flip stackAwaitingKey[top] between key and value positions.
124   // ==============================================================================================
125   @Override /* TokenReader */
126   public TokenType next() throws IOException, ParseException {
127      if (ended) {
128         currentToken = TokenType.END_OF_STREAM;
129         return currentToken;
130      }
131      currentString = null;
132      currentNumberLexeme = null;
133      currentNumber = null;
134      currentBinary = null;
135      nativeKind = BinaryNativeKind.NONE;
136
137      // Inside a container at element-count zero: emit END_*.
138      if (depth > 0 && stackRemaining[depth - 1] == 0) {
139         popContainer();
140         return currentToken;
141      }
142
143      DataType dt;
144      try {
145         dt = is.readDataType();
146      } catch (IOException e) {
147         if (depth == 0) {
148            ended = true;
149            currentToken = TokenType.END_OF_STREAM;
150            return currentToken;
151         }
152         throw e;
153      }
154
155      // Map key position: emit FIELD_NAME.
156      if (depth > 0 && stackIsMap[depth - 1] && stackAwaitingKey[depth - 1]) {
157         currentToken = TokenType.FIELD_NAME;
158         currentString = readScalarAsString(dt);
159         consumedOneElement();
160         return currentToken;
161      }
162
163      switch (dt) {
164         case ARRAY -> {
165            pushContainer(false, is.readLength());
166            currentToken = TokenType.START_ARRAY;
167         }
168         case MAP -> {
169            var n = is.readLength();
170            pushContainer(true, n * 2);  // pair-count -> element-count
171            currentToken = TokenType.START_OBJECT;
172         }
173         case INT -> {
174            var v = (long) is.readInt();
175            currentNumber = v;
176            currentNumberLexeme = Long.toString(v);
177            currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_NUMBER;
178            consumedOneElement();
179         }
180         case LONG -> {
181            var v = is.readLong();
182            currentNumber = v;
183            currentNumberLexeme = Long.toString(v);
184            currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_NUMBER;
185            consumedOneElement();
186         }
187         case FLOAT -> {
188            var v = (double) is.readFloat();
189            currentNumber = v;
190            currentNumberLexeme = Double.toString(v);
191            currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_NUMBER;
192            consumedOneElement();
193         }
194         case DOUBLE -> {
195            var v = is.readDouble();
196            currentNumber = v;
197            currentNumberLexeme = Double.toString(v);
198            currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_NUMBER;
199            consumedOneElement();
200         }
201         case BOOLEAN -> {
202            currentBoolean = is.readBoolean();
203            currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_BOOLEAN;
204            consumedOneElement();
205         }
206         case NULL -> {
207            currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_NULL;
208            consumedOneElement();
209         }
210         case STRING -> {
211            currentString = is.readString();
212            currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_STRING;
213            consumedOneElement();
214         }
215         case BIN -> {
216            currentBinary = is.readBinary();
217            currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_BINARY;
218            consumedOneElement();
219         }
220         case EXT -> {
221            // Q3 default: normalize to common scalars; the extension payload surfaces as
222            // VALUE_BINARY.  In native mode (175ad), the signed ext type byte is also
223            // captured for retrieval via getExtType().
224            if (nativeMode) {
225               extType = (byte) is.getExtType();
226               nativeKind = BinaryNativeKind.MSGPACK_EXT;
227            }
228            currentBinary = is.readBinary();
229            currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_BINARY;
230            consumedOneElement();
231         }
232         default -> throw new ParseException("Unexpected MsgPack data type: {0}", dt);
233      }
234      return currentToken;
235   }
236
237   private String readScalarAsString(DataType dt) throws IOException, ParseException {
238      switch (dt) {
239         case STRING:    return is.readString();
240         case INT:       return Long.toString(is.readInt());
241         case LONG:      return Long.toString(is.readLong());
242         case BIN: {
243            var b = is.readBinary();
244            return new String(b, java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
245         }
246         case BOOLEAN:   return Boolean.toString(is.readBoolean());
247         case FLOAT:     return Float.toString(is.readFloat());
248         case DOUBLE:    return Double.toString(is.readDouble());
249         default:
250            throw new ParseException("Cannot use MsgPack data type {0} as a map key", dt);
251      }
252   }
253
254   private void pushContainer(boolean isMap, long remaining) {
255      if (depth == stackRemaining.length) {
256         var n = depth * 2;
257         var nr = new long[n];
258         var nm = new boolean[n];
259         var nk = new boolean[n];
260         System.arraycopy(stackRemaining, 0, nr, 0, depth);
261         System.arraycopy(stackIsMap, 0, nm, 0, depth);
262         System.arraycopy(stackAwaitingKey, 0, nk, 0, depth);
263         stackRemaining = nr;
264         stackIsMap = nm;
265         stackAwaitingKey = nk;
266      }
267      stackRemaining[depth] = remaining;
268      stackIsMap[depth] = isMap;
269      stackAwaitingKey[depth] = isMap;
270      depth++;
271   }
272
273   private void popContainer() {
274      depth--;
275      currentToken = stackIsMap[depth] ? TokenType.END_OBJECT : TokenType.END_ARRAY;
276      consumedOneElement();
277   }
278
279   private void consumedOneElement() {
280      if (depth == 0)
281         return;
282      var top = depth - 1;
283      stackRemaining[top]--;
284      if (stackIsMap[top])
285         stackAwaitingKey[top] = !stackAwaitingKey[top];
286   }
287
288   @Override /* TokenReader */
289   public TokenType getCurrentToken() { return currentToken; }
290
291   @Override /* TokenReader */
292   public int getDepth() { return depth; }
293
294   @Override /* TokenReader */
295   public String getFieldName() {
296      if (currentToken != TokenType.FIELD_NAME)
297         throw new IllegalStateException("Current token is not FIELD_NAME (was " + currentToken + ")");
298      return currentString;
299   }
300
301   @Override /* TokenReader */
302   public String getString() {
303      switch (currentToken) {
304         case VALUE_STRING:  return currentString;
305         case FIELD_NAME:    return currentString;
306         case VALUE_NUMBER:  return currentNumberLexeme;
307         case VALUE_BOOLEAN: return Boolean.toString(currentBoolean);
308         case VALUE_NULL:    return null;
309         default: throw new IllegalStateException(
310            "Current token does not have a string view (was " + currentToken + ")");
311      }
312   }
313
314   @Override /* TokenReader */
315   public Number getNumber() throws ParseException {
316      if (currentToken != TokenType.VALUE_NUMBER)
317         throw new IllegalStateException("Current token is not VALUE_NUMBER (was " + currentToken + ")");
318      return currentNumber;
319   }
320
321   @Override /* TokenReader */
322   public String getNumberLexeme() {
323      if (currentToken != TokenType.VALUE_NUMBER)
324         throw new IllegalStateException("Current token is not VALUE_NUMBER (was " + currentToken + ")");
325      return currentNumberLexeme;
326   }
327
328   @Override /* TokenReader */
329   public boolean getBool() {
330      if (currentToken != TokenType.VALUE_BOOLEAN)
331         throw new IllegalStateException("Current token is not VALUE_BOOLEAN (was " + currentToken + ")");
332      return currentBoolean;
333   }
334
335   @Override /* TokenReader */
336   public byte[] getBinary() {
337      if (currentToken != TokenType.VALUE_BINARY)
338         throw new IllegalStateException("Current token is not VALUE_BINARY (was " + currentToken + ")");
339      return currentBinary;
340   }
341
342   @Override /* TokenReader */
343   public boolean canRead() throws IOException, ParseException {
344      return !ended && !(depth > 0 && stackRemaining[depth - 1] == 0);
345   }
346
347   @Override /* TokenReader */
348   public <T> T read(Class<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException {
349      return read(session().getClassMeta(type));
350   }
351
352   @Override /* TokenReader */
353   public <T> T read(ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException {
354      var s = session();
355      if (!canRead())
356         throw new IllegalStateException(MSG_READ_NON_VALUE_STATE);
357      try {
358         T o = s.parseAnything(type, is, null, null);
359         consumedOneElement();
360         currentToken = TokenType.NOT_AVAILABLE;
361         return o;
362      } catch (Exception e) {
363         if (e instanceof IOException ioe) throw ioe;
364         if (e instanceof ParseException pe) throw pe;
365         throw new ParseException(s, "read failed: {0}", e.getMessage());
366      }
367   }
368
369   @Override /* TokenReader */
370   public <T> T read(Type type, Type... args) throws IOException, ParseException {
371      return read(session().<T>getClassMeta(type, args));
372   }
373
374   private MsgPackParserSession session() {
375      if (session == null)
376         throw new UnsupportedOperationException(
377            "read is not available on this MsgPackTokenReader (no session attached). " +
378            "Open the cursor via MsgPackParser.parseTokens(...) to enable read.");
379      return session;
380   }
381
382   @Override /* TokenReader */
383   public void skipChildren() throws IOException, ParseException {
384      if (currentToken != TokenType.START_OBJECT && currentToken != TokenType.START_ARRAY)
385         return;
386      var startDepth = depth - 1;
387      while (depth > startDepth) {
388         var t = next();
389         if (t == TokenType.END_OF_STREAM)
390            throw new ParseException("Unexpected end of input while skipping children");
391      }
392   }
393
394   @Override /* TokenReader */
395   public boolean isStreaming() { return true; }
396
397   @Override /* TokenReader */
398   public void close() throws IOException { pipe.close(); }
399
400   @Override /* TokenReader */
401   public BinaryNativeKind getNativeKind() {
402      return nativeKind;
403   }
404
405   @Override /* TokenReader */
406   public int getTagCount() {
407      return 0;
408   }
409
410   @Override /* TokenReader */
411   public long getTag(int index) {
412      throw new IndexOutOfBoundsException("Tag index " + index + " out of bounds for tagCount 0");
413   }
414
415   @Override /* TokenReader */
416   public int getExtType() {
417      if (nativeKind != BinaryNativeKind.MSGPACK_EXT)
418         throw new IllegalStateException("Current token is not a MsgPack ext (nativeKind=" + nativeKind + ")");
419      return extType;
420   }
421
422   @Override /* TokenReader */
423   public int getSimpleValue() {
424      throw new IllegalStateException("MsgPack cursor has no CBOR simple value.");
425   }
426}
